subject: fix(icon): match Pico cyan theme colour and remove glow effect
body:
Changed icon colour from #06b6d4 (Tailwind cyan-500) to #0ab1b1
(Pico CSS cyan theme primary). The previous colour clashed with
the Pico theme on both light and dark backgrounds.

Removed the feGaussianBlur glow filter — the soft bloom around
shapes looked out of place in the clean Pico UI.

Regenerated all PNG icons (48, 192, 512) from the updated SVG.

Tags: ui, icon, branding
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-polish
Semver: patch
